Definition: species binomial as printed in Table S1 (spaces -> underscores; trinomials kept e.g. Gorilla_gorilla_gorilla)
Note: reconcile to _keys/Stephan/species_key.csv at the compilation step
Source Note: Smaers et al. 2017 Curr Biol Table S1 'Smaers data' block

Definition: primary visual cortex grey matter volume
Note: units printed mm3 but values scale as cm3 (match Smaers 2011); primary visual from de Sousa et al. 2010 [S6]
proxy = cumulative volume of the ANTERIOR 5 of 20 frontal sections (Smaers 2011 Suppl. Table 2); from Smaers 2010 [S1] + 2011 [S2]; cm3

Definition: other cortical association areas grey matter volume
Note: defined as neocortex minus frontal lobe minus primary visual (Smaers 2017 Suppl., Data section); cm3

Definition: frontal motor areas grey matter volume
Note: proxy = cumulative volume of the POSTERIOR 5 of 20 frontal sections; NOT independently published (Smaers 2011 printed only the anterior part); cm3

Definition: primary visual cortex white matter volume
Note: units printed mm3 but values scale as cm3

Definition: other cortical association areas white matter volume
Note: neocortex minus frontal lobe minus primary visual (white); cm3

Definition: frontal motor areas white matter volume

Note: compiled from Smaers 2010 [S1] + Smaers 2011 [S2] + de Sousa 2010 [S6]; not newly measured

Definition: prefrontal + frontal motor do NOT sum to the whole frontal lobe: they are the anterior-5 and posterior-5 of 20 frontal sections (the two ends); the ~10 middle sections are in neither, so the sum is ~37% of total frontal-lobe volume. For whole frontal lobe use Smaers_etal_2011 Suppl. Table 1.
the supplement labels all volumes mm3; the values are in fact cm3 (they reproduce Smaers 2011 cm3 exactly). Snapshot keeps the printed mm3 label; treat as cm3 downstream.
